name: Improper Neutralization of Multiple Leading Special Elements
description: The product does not properly handle multiple leading special characters in user input (e.g., '//' interpreted as UNC path, '--' as end-of-options), where the repetition changes the semantic meaning from a single instance.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with multiple consecutive leading special characters that flows to EXTERNAL[interpreter] or STORAGE[file_access] without a TRANSFORM[multiple_leading_strip] that normalizes or rejects repeated leading special elements
